title: Section 21
content: Any person who has attained the age of fifteen years may be a member of a registered Trade Union subject to any rules of the Trade Union to the contrary, and may, subject as aforesaid, enjoy all the rights of a member and execute all instruments and give all acquittances necessary to be executed or given under the rules. 1* * * * *
footnote: 1. The proviso omitted by s. 4, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-4-1965).
